title: DebtNavigator
intent: Debt optimization plans with payoff simulation and consolidation analysis
requirements: accounts module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
plans module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
optimization module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
consolidation module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
projections module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
milestones module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
